<output>
Here is the full report of the project at `/home/user/workspace`.

---

## 1. Next.js Version

**`next: "16.2.0-canary.41"`** -- This is a canary (pre-release) build of Next.js 16, which is notable since Next.js 16 has not been released as stable yet (as of mid-2026).

## 2. Full Directory Structure (excluding node_modules)

```
/home/user/workspace/
  .git/
  .gitignore
  components/
    AppProvider.js
  next.config.ts
  pages/
    404.js
    _app.js
    _document.js
    _error.js
    index.js
    api/
      posts/
        [id].js
        index.js
    blog/
      [id].js
      index.js
  styles/
    globals.css
  tsconfig.json
  package.json
  package-lock.json
```

## 3. All Files in `pages/` (Recursively, with Content Summaries)

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/index.js`
Homepage -- uses `getServerSideProps`. Fetches 5 posts from JSONPlaceholder. Passes `userAgent` and `timestamp` as props. Renders a welcome message, the timestamp, user agent string, a list of 5 post links, and a "View All Posts" button using `router.push('/blog')`.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/_app.js`
Custom App component -- wraps all pages in `AppProvider` context. Renders a global layout with a `<header>` (site title, Home/Blog nav links via `next/link`), `<main>` for page content, and `<footer>`. Imports global CSS from `../styles/globals.css`.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/_document.js`
Custom Document -- sets `<Html lang="en">`. Includes meta description, favicon link, Google Fonts preconnect, and Inter font stylesheet. Renders `<Main />` and `<NextScript />`.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/_error.js`
Custom error page -- uses `getInitialProps` to extract `statusCode` from `res` or `err`. Displays server-side vs client-side error messaging, with special 404 handling ("This page could not be found." vs generic "Sorry, something went wrong.").

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/404.js`
Custom 404 page -- independent of `_error.js`. Displays "404 - Page Not Found" with a meta description and a "Go Back Home" button using `router.push('/')`.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/blog/index.js`
Blog listing page (SSG + ISR) -- uses `getStaticProps` with `revalidate: 60`. Fetches all posts from JSONPlaceholder. Renders a grid of post cards (title, 100-char excerpt), each with a "Read More" button using `router.push`.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/blog/[id].js`
Single blog post page (SSG + ISR) -- uses `getStaticPaths` (first 10 posts, `fallback: 'blocking'`) and `getStaticProps` (revalidate 300). Fetches post + comments from JSONPlaceholder in parallel. Handles `fallback` with a loading div. Renders post title/body, a back button, and a comments section. Error path returns `{ notFound: true }`.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/api/posts/index.js`
API route -- handles `GET` (returns simulated array of 2 posts) and `POST` (validates title/content required, returns simulated created post). Returns 405 for other methods.

### `/home/user/workspace/pages/api/posts/[id].js`
API route with dynamic param -- handles `GET` (returns simulated single post), `PUT` (returns simulated updated post), and `DELETE` (returns success message). Returns 405 for other methods.

## 4. `tsconfig.json` Configuration

```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": { "@/*": ["./*"] }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}
```
